Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Underlady]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — The Underlady wears a sparkling sacred artist's robe of red, gold, and purple.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — The Underlady has golden eyes that are vertically slitted and patches of gold scales on her cheeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — The Underlady has a thin, gold-scaled tail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — The Underlady carries a sword that crackles with orange lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — The Underlady attacks Yerin with a rush of liquid flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — The Underlady is tackled by her retainers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — The Underlady shouts at the Skysworn.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — The woman who appeared was an Underlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — The Underlady is a woman with long, burning hair who burns her way through the forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — The process of becoming an Underlady involves facing the truth of oneself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Underlady is a stage of advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — There is an Underlady with gray skin and long, flowing silver hair gathered in a purple ribbon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — The Underlady was regenerating at Lindon's feet.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — The Underlady used soulfire in her technique.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Sophara's family pushed her beyond the maximum capacity of an Underlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — An Underlady used the echo Forger technique while struggling to maintain an Overlord’s madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — As an Underlady, Yerin can go without sleep longer than before.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — An Underlady in Akura colors healed Daji.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — An Underlady is part of the enemy ranks.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
